programmes.show_description: Find the best in health and fitness products to give you a spring in your step and a healthier lifestyle. From top tips and great gadgets, we'll help you to revitalise your daily routine.
Celebrate 100 years of Laura Ashley. Discover timeless prints, elegant designs and heritage style to refresh your home and wardrobe with classic British charm.
Transform your outdoor space with Spring Garden Refresh. Discover inspiring ideas and must-have products to help your garden bloom this season!

Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Want to know what's hot in the world of electronics? Tune in and explore the latest innovations in TVs, computers, tablets, cameras and more from the leading brands you know and trust.
Grow your garden with YouGarden in 4 interest-free instalments. Discover fantastic plants and gardening essentials, all available in easy, affordable payments.
